packages.summary: Expand CLI automation outputs for generation, inspection, migration, scaffolding, and generator metadata.
packages.rationale: The CLI package owns command parsing and user-visible behavior for request DTO feature targets, inspect reports and file output, migrate JSON reports, generate dry-run plans, new command plan previews, and built-in generator collection help.

packages.summary: Expose Studio-owned snapshot-to-Mermaid rendering helpers and platform snapshot types.
packages.rationale: Studio owns the public snapshot consumption and graph rendering contract used by CLI and automation callers through renderMermaid(snapshot) and the exported platform snapshot and diagnostic types.

packages.summary: Refresh the published Fastify adapter dependency metadata.
packages.rationale: The platform-fastify package manifest now depends on fastify@^5.8.5 as a maintenance update for the published adapter package.

packages.summary: Keep runtime out of the beta.2 publish set because only README wording changed.
packages.rationale: The runtime package has post-beta.1 documentation wording updates, but no runtime source, manifest, or public API change that requires a package publish for this candidate.

packages.summary: Keep testing out of the beta.2 publish set because only governance conformance tests changed.
packages.rationale: The testing package changes are release-governance test coverage only and do not alter the published testing helpers or package metadata.
